natural_occurrence.description: The most biologically active form of Vitamin E. Main dietary source in European diet (from olive and sunflower oils). The natural form (d-alpha) is more bioavailable than synthetic (dl-alpha).

manufacturing.method: extraction from vegetable oils or chemical synthesis
manufacturing.description: Natural d-alpha-tocopherol extracted from vegetable oil deodorizer distillate, particularly from sunflower and wheat germ oils. Synthetic dl-alpha-tocopherol produced through chemical synthesis from petrochemical precursors.

other_uses.pharmaceutical: Vitamin E supplements (most common form), antioxidant in drug formulations

eu.conditions: Evaluated together with E306, E308, E309

usa.notes: Approved as antioxidant and nutrient supplement

regulatory_history.event: EFSA concludes no safety concerns given widespread consumption as essential nutrient

adi_context.source_note: EFSA concluded no safety concern at reported uses and levels. Alpha-tocopherol is the most bioactive form of vitamin E, an essential nutrient.

fun_facts.title: Vitamin E Champion
fun_facts.description: The most biologically active form of all eight vitamin E variants - your body preferentially retains and uses alpha-tocopherol over other forms.

fun_facts.title: Natural vs. Synthetic Mystery
fun_facts.description: Natural d-alpha-tocopherol (from plants) is about 50% more bioactive than synthetic dl-alpha-tocopherol (from chemistry), even though they're nearly identical molecules!

fun_facts.title: Brain Protector
fun_facts.description: Alpha-tocopherol is the predominant form of vitamin E in the brain and nervous system, protecting these critical fatty tissues from oxidative damage.

fun_facts.title: Sunflower Superstar
fun_facts.description: Sunflower oil is richest in alpha-tocopherol, making it a prime source for both dietary vitamin E and commercial extraction.

fun_facts.title: European Essential
fun_facts.description: Main vitamin E source in European diets through olive and sunflower oils, making E307 both a traditional dietary component and a food additive.
